mapper.select: SELECT ja.id, ja.application_case_id, ac.user_id, u.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ja.employment_type, ja.experience_level, ja.required_skills, ja.preferred_skills, ja.difficulty, ja.summary, ja.created_at FROM job_analysis ja JOIN application_case ac ON ja.application_case_id = ac.id JOIN users u ON ac.user_id = u.id ORDER BY ja.created_at DESC, ja.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ca.id, ca.application_case_id, ac.user_id, u.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ca.company_summary, ca.recent_issues, ca.industry, ca.competitors, ca.sources, ca.created_at FROM company_analysis ca JOIN application_case ac ON ca.application_case_id = ac.id JOIN users u ON ac.user_id = u.id ORDER BY ca.created_at DESC, ca.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT aul.id, aul.user_id, u.email AS user_email, aul.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, aul.feature_type, aul.status, aul.model, aul.input_tokens, aul.output_tokens, aul.token_usage, aul.credit_used, aul.error_message, aul.created_at FROM ai_usage_log aul JOIN users u ON aul.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON aul.application_case_id = ac.id WHERE aul.feature_type IN ('JOB_ANALYSIS', 'COMPANY_RESEARCH', 'JOB_POSTING_OCR') ORDER BY aul.created_at DESC, aul.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
